sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁכח

Transliteration: shekach

Phonetic: shek-akh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to find
    1. (Aphel) to find
    2. (Ithpeal) to be found

Origin: corresponding to H7911 through the idea of disclosure of a covered or forgotten thing

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Verb
